mapper.sql: id, page_name, page_code, layout_config, description, theme, theme_config, parameter_panel, status, mobile_enabled, layout_mode, bigscreen_config, mobile_layout_config, project_id, create_by, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM page_definition
AND (page_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR page_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND layout_mode = #{layoutMode}
AND (layout_mode IS NULL OR layout_mode = '' OR layout_mode = 'desktop')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO page_definition (page_name, page_code, layout_config, description, theme, theme_config, parameter_panel, status, layout_mode, bigscreen_config, mobile_layout_config, project_id, create_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{pageName}, #{pageCode}, #{layoutConfig}, #{description}, #{theme}, #{themeConfig}, #{parameterPanel}, #{status}, #{layoutMode}, #{bigscreenConfig}, #{mobileLayoutConfig}, #{projectId}, #{createBy}, NOW(), NOW())
